zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke於1498年出生在英國肯特易亞斯丘其時，她的父親Sir Thomas II Frowick39歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Barnville33歲。她於1515年之前與Sir Thomas Cheney在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯丘其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1562年5月18日在英國肯特明斯特享年64歲，埋葬在英國肯特明斯特 在 謝坡。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke于1498年出生在英国肯特易亞斯丘其时，她的父亲Sir Thomas II Frowick39岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Barnville33岁。她于1515年之前与Sir Thomas Cheney在英国英格兰肯特易亞斯丘其结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1562年5月18日在英国肯特明斯特享年64岁，埋葬在英国肯特明斯特 在 謝坡。

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke was born in 1498, in Eastchurch, Kent, England, her father, Sir Thomas II Frowick, was 39 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Barnville, was 33. She married Sir Thomas Cheney before 1515, in Eastchurch, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 18 May 1562, in Minster, Kent, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England.

fr.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United K: Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke est née en 1498, à Eastchurch, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas II Frowick, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Barnville, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Cheney avant 1515, à Eastchurch, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 mai 1562, à Minster, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Minster in Sheppey, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United K: Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke 1498 in Eastchurch, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas II Frowick 39 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Barnville 33. Sie hat vor 1515 in Eastchurch, Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Cheney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Mai 1562 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Minster, Kent, England und wurde in Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke è nata il nel 1498 nel Eastchurch, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas II Frowick, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Barnville, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Cheney prima del 1515, nel Eastchurch, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 18 maggio 1562, nel Minster, Kent, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Frideswide Anne Frowickeが1498年にイギリスケントエアストチャーチで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas II Frowickは39歳，母Lady Elizabeth Barnvilleは33歳であった。1515年以前にイギリスイギリスケントエアストチャーチでSir Thomas Cheneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1562年5月18日にイギリスケントミンスターで64歳で死去し，イギリスケントミンスター イン シェッピーにて埋葬された。

ko.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United K: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이슬일 프 셰프피
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke(이)가 1498년 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas II Frowick(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Barnville(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1515년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 Sir Thomas Cheney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1562년 5월 18일 영국 켄트 민스터에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 민스터 인 셰프피에 묻혔다.

pt.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United K: Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke nasceu em 1498, em Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas II Frowick, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Barnville, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Cheney antes 1515, em Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de maio de 1562, em Minster, Kent, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Minster in Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United K: исл оф шеппи, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke родилась в 1498 г. в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas II Frowick было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Barnville, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Cheney перед 1515 г. в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 18 мая 1562 г. в местности минстир, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности минстир ин шеппи, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke nació en 1498, en Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas II Frowick, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Barnville, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Cheney antes de 1515, en Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1562, en Minster, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Minster in Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra.
